2263790.name: GAMEBOOSTER
2263790.description:
This tool squeezes real performance out of your PC—no snake oil, no risk. It combines a smart game booster that applies the right performance profile when your game launches with an HDD-friendly preload system that cuts loading stutter. On top, you get GPU preference control, a lightweight crosshair overlay, shader-cache cleanup, and practical system tweaks. Ideal if you want fast, repeatable results without manual fiddling.

Why You’ll Like It

  • Noticeably smoother: Applies the right Windows optimizations, priorities, and service states for your game.

  • Faster loads—even on HDDs: Preloads files in controlled chunks to reduce hitching and background thrashing.

  • Profiles, not guesswork: Gaming, Balanced, or Power Saver—switch in a click, feel the difference.

  • Clean & reversible: No dangerous registry hacks. Everything is transparent and undoable.

  • Anti-cheat friendly: Uses system-level info; no code injection into the game process.

Core Features

  • Smart Game Booster

    • Sets CPU priorities for selected processes.

    • Starts/stops optional services (e.g., updates/print) for a lean play session.

    • Startup cleanup to free resources.

  • HDD-Friendly Preload

    • Preloads game files in configurable MB chunks with I/O throttling for HDDs.

    • Optional Top-N MB to preload only the most impactful data.

    • Supports a “prefer” list via hotset.json (learns frequently accessed files).

  • GPU Preferences

    • Quickly prioritize integrated vs. dedicated GPU (where supported by the system).

    • Save/load presets.

  • Overlay (Crosshair)

    • Always on top, click-through, adjustable size/color/transparency.

    • Hotkey to toggle visibility.

  • Shader Cache Manager

    • Shows common cache locations (DirectX/Vulkan/GL).

    • Deletes only files older than N days, if desired.

    • Note: shaders will auto-recompile on next launch.

  • Profiles & Settings

    • Gaming / Balanced / Power Saver starting points.

    • Save/load profiles, backup/restore settings.

  • System Info & Monitoring

    • Quick view of network/system status, lightweight graphs, handy shortcuts.

Who It’s For

  • Gamers with HDD installs or chatty background services.

  • Creators/Streamers needing repeatable performance profiles.

  • Laptop users switching between battery saving and max performance.

What It’s Not

  • Not a miracle fix for broken drivers or thermal throttling.

  • Not a cheat: no process injection, no packet tampering.

FAQ

Do I have to configure each game?
No. Profiles cover most cases. Fine-tuning is optional.

Anti-cheat risk?
Designed to be process-external (priorities, services, file preload). No code injection.

Any benefit on SSDs?
Yes—profiles and priorities still help. Preload mainly targets HDD bottlenecks.

System Requirements

  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)

  • Processor: x64 CPU

  • Memory: 4 GB RAM (8 GB recommended)

  • Storage: 200 MB for the app + variable cache

  • Other: Admin rights recommended for service/startup actions
